title: pouteria juruana
intro: Pouteria juruana, also known as the lapacho tree, is a medicinal plant native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The bark of the Pouteria juruana tree contains high concentrations of naphthoquinones, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antitumor activities. The health benefits of Pouteria juruana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Pouteria juruana involve boiling the bark in water to create a tea, which is then consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
